info.title: Advertising Partners
paragraph: Big Chief Ent offers a powerful in-house advertising system designed for brands, businesses, and individuals looking to promote their products or services. Our platform provides a secure and streamlined advertising experience with full control over ad creation, placement, and performance tracking.

Every advertising partner will have access to a dedicated dashboard where they can upload advertisements, manage placements across the platform, and monitor real-time analytics such as impressions, clicks, and engagement performance.

info.title: How Advertising Works
paragraph: We primarily operate on a CPM (Cost Per Mille) model, meaning advertisers are charged based on every 1,000 impressions their ads receive. This ensures consistent exposure and brand visibility across our growing audience.

In certain cases, advertisers may choose to use a CPC (Cost Per Click) model. This option is ideal for campaigns focused on direct user interaction, such as redirecting users to external websites, products, or services.

info.title: Advertising Features

data: Custom advertising dashboard for full campaign control
Upload and manage multiple ad creatives
Flexible ad placement options across the platform
Real-time analytics including impressions, clicks, and engagement
Optional CPC model for link-based campaigns
Secure in-house ad delivery system to protect users and advertisers
Fraud protection and click-spam prevention mechanisms

paragraph: All advertisements are processed through our internal systems to ensure security, performance, and a safe experience for both users and advertisers.

info.title: Content Creator Accounts
paragraph: Big Chief Ent empowers creators by providing a complete content management and monetization system. Every content creator will have access to a personalized dashboard designed to track and manage all their uploaded content.
Creators can monitor key performance metrics such as views, engagement, comments, and average ratings across videos and articles, giving them full insight into their audience and growth.

data: Centralized dashboard for all uploaded content
Easy content upload and management system

info.title: Monetization & Payout System
paragraph: Our platform connects advertisers directly with content creators. Ads placed on creator content generate revenue based on impressions and engagement, allowing creators to earn from their work.
Creators begin earning immediately once their content is live and approved. Payments are processed on a monthly basis, with a structured payout system that ensures consistency and reliability.

As the platform grows, payment cycles will remain monthly and will not exceed a 10-day processing window after each cycle. All creators must adhere to platform policies and content guidelines to remain eligible for monetization.

info.title: Important Notes

data: All creators must follow platform content and community guidelines
Revenue is generated through platform advertising partnerships
Payments begin immediately after approval and content publishing
Monthly payout cycles with a maximum processing window of 10 days
Violation of policies may result in demonetization or removal

paragraph: We are currently in an active development stage, and additional features, tools, and monetization options will continue to be introduced. More detailed information will be provided as the platform evolves.
